content:
# Session 28 (iter-028) — review

## Metadata
- Stage: prover (`mathlib-build`). Lane = **1.3 (`H_locallyFree`) brick (iii) surjectivity + assembly**.
- Sorry: **4 → 4** (flat, EXPECTED; deep §1 sorries L970/979/993/1011 no-touch).
- Axioms: **14 → 14 `External.*`** (NO new axiom — pure build; reuses `flat_pullback_exact`).
- Build: `lake build` exit 0 (8475 jobs, 33s). 5 new decls `lean_verify`-clean.
- Events: 53 — 9 edits (incl. 2 memory + 1 task_result), 7 diagnostics (4 clean), 14 searches, 0 builds-as-goal-check, 2 transient errors (both self-corrected).

## Headline
**`Ext¹_X(I, j_*j^*F) = 0` is assembled axiom-clean** — the homological half of `T(k(s)) = 0`. All four planner-targeted bricks (iii) compiled + one NEW bridge helper. The @028 reversal tripwire (flat-threading recedes → land partial) did NOT fire; everything landed. Plus a **genuine mathematical correction** of the planner's flatness bridge (false in general — see Findings).

## Solved (5 decls, axiom-clean — section before final `end MR0555258CompactifyingPicard`, `open CategoryTheory.Abelian`)
- **`acyclic_ses`** (L1793) — SES `0→K→J→I→0` from `exists_acyclic_surjection`; `ShortComplex.mk (kernel.ι π) π (kernel.condition π)` + `ShortExact.mk (exact_kernel π)`; `X₃` defeq `I`, `X₂` defeq `J`, carries J-acyclicity. Same pattern as 1.4 (L1500).
- **`ext0_precomp_surjective_iff`** (L1810) — NEW helper bridge: degree-0 `Ext`-precomp surjectivity ↔ `Hom`-precomp surjectivity, via `Ext.mk₀_bijective` + `Ext.mk₀_comp_mk₀` + `Ext.homEquiv₀`. **Needs blueprint (unmatched).** First attempt failed: `rw [Ext.mk₀_comp_mk₀,…]` → "Did not find an occurrence of the pattern `(Ext.mk₀ ?f).comp (Ext.mk₀ ?g)`" because the goal was a non-beta-reduced lambda application; fixed by `simp only at hvh ⊢` first.
- **`adjunction_ladder_surjective`** (L1838) — transport precomp surjectivity through `pullbackPushforwardAdjunction j`; `homEquiv.symm` pull → fibre lift → `homEquiv` push, square commutes by `Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_left`. **Confirms naturality is FREE** (`External.adjunction` literally IS this adjunction's `homEquiv.symm`), settling @027's "naturality upgrade" worry as a non-issue.
- **`fibre_hom_surjective`** (L1863) — fibre-side `Hom`-surjectivity. Takes pulled-back SES short-exactness `hSEpull` as EXPLICIT hypothesis (isolates flatness to assembly, keeps lemma axiom-clean); `FiberExtVanishes` ⇒ connecting map lands in zero group (`isZero_extGroup_iff`), `Ext.contravariant_sequence_exact₁` ⇒ Ext⁰-precomp surjectivity, `ext0_precomp_surjective_iff` restates in `Hom`.
- **`ext1_X_pushforward_fibre_vanishes`** (L1898) — assembly: `Ext¹_X(I, j_*j^*F)=0`. `acyclic_ses` → `External.flat_pullback_exact (j≫f) j sc hsc … hpullflat e` (e = `mapIso (eqToIso hX3.symm)`, threads flatness of original `I`'s pullback) → `ext1_isZero_of_acyclic_chase` with `hJ=acyclic_ext1_vanishes`, `hsurj` from the three bricks. `#print axioms` = `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound, External.exists_extensionByZero_surjection, External.extensionByZero_coprod_acyclic, External.flat_pullback_exact}` — NO new axiom.

## GENUINE FINDING — planner's flatness bridge is FALSE
The plan's `## Disprove pass` asserted `0→K→J→I→0` exact + `I` S-flat ⟹ pulled-back fibre SES exact (Tor₁ vanishes), and intended `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing` to carry only `(hI : IsSFlat f I)` and *derive* `hpullflat : IsSFlat (j≫f) (j^*I)`. **The bridge `IsSFlat f I ⟹ IsSFlat (j≫f) (j^*I)` is mathematically FALSE in general.** Stalkwise `((pullback j) I)_y = I_{j(y)} ⊗_{O_{X,j(y)}} O_{X(s),y}`; flatness over `O_{S,…}` needs both `I_{j(y)}` flat over `O_{X,j(y)}` AND `j` flat — and `j = f.fiberι s` (a fibre/closed preimmersion) is NOT flat. AK's actual argument uses `I` S-flat ⟹ `Tor₁^{O_S}(I, k(s)) = 0` and base change **along `S → Spec k(s)`** (a different, correct mechanism). So the prover correctly took `hpullflat` (S-flatness of `j^*I`) and `hWqc` (quasicoherence of `j_*j^*F`) as EXPLICIT hypotheses (named gaps, NOT new axioms) rather than attempt a false derivation. This is the right call — surfaced as a HIGH recommendation.

## Untouched (deferred deep §1 sorries — correctly not attempted)
- `H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing` (L993, active 1.3) — needs brick 5 (fibre id `j_*j^*F ≅ F⊗_S k(s)~`, new anchor) + brick 6 (reduction→Spec A + `H_represents`⟹free); signature still missing `(hI : IsSFlat f I)`.
- `H_tensor_invertible` (L970, PAUSED monoidal), `H_tensor` (L979), `ext_finite_flat` (L1011, relExt/`R^q f_*` absent).

## Graph / sync / blueprint
- `dag-query`: gaps=0, **unmatched=1** (`ext0_precomp_surjective_iff` — new helper, no blueprint block) → recommendations.md.
- `sync_leanok`: iter=28, sha 5fd096c, added=8, removed=0 — the 4 pre-blueprinted @028 targets (`lem:acyclic_ses`, `lem:fibre_hom_surjective`, `lem:adjunction_ladder_surjective`, `lem:ext1_X_pushforward_fibre_vanishes`) + @027 debt cleared by planner. All verified consistent; no laundering, no manual override.
- Doctor: 14 `External.*` re-flagged (intentional EGA/OB/Stacks boundary; +0 new). No orphan chapters / broken refs.
- **Blueprint markers updated (manual): none.** sync handled all four; no `\mathlibok`/`\lean{...}`/`% NOTE:` warranted. The blueprint signatures of `lem:fibre_hom_surjective` and `lem:ext1_X_pushforward_fibre_vanishes` differ from realized Lean (explicit `hSEpull`/`hpullflat`/`hWqc` hyps) — flagged for planner to reconcile prose (review does not write informal prose).

## Subagent skips
- All review subagents disabled (classic single-agent loop; catalog has none enabled). No `[MANDATORY]` review subagent. Pure build round; 5 in-file decls covered by `lean_verify` + dag-query. No dispatch warranted.

## Convergence verdict
**Genuine, planned build progress — best-case `mathlib-build` iter.** Sorry-flat + zero-new-axioms + 5 axiom-clean decls is the expected infra signature. The brick-(iii) sub-lane is now COMPLETE (`Ext¹_X(I,j_*j^*F)=0` assembled). 1.3 is ~2 anchors + 1 reduction from close. NOT receding-horizon churn (cf. 019–021): each iter since 023 lands forward-feeding bricks. The flatness-bridge correction is a quality signal — the prover refused a false derivation rather than grind a sorry.
